body.notes: Add composite index on wg_cooccur(word_a, word_b) to fix full-table-scan on INSERT/UPDATE. Migration at startup in word_graph.py or ensure_indexes. Close #327.
body.title: T-wg-cooccur-index: Add index on wg_cooccur(word_a, word_b)
body.result: Verified complete — wg_cooccur already has all required indexes in PostgreSQL: wg_cooccur_pkey PRIMARY KEY btree(word_a, word_b) used as conflict arbiter for upserts, idx_wgc_covering btree(word_a, word_b, score) used for UPDATE. EXPLAIN confirms no full-table-scan. _SCHEMA DDL in word_graph.py creates them via CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS at init. No code change needed.
